rationale: Educ. Code §54.363 governs tuition exemptions for eligible educational aides at institutions of higher education. It has no operational link to the residence homestead property tax exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b); the two provisions address distinct tax and education policy areas.
_note: No conflict identified. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption does not intersect with the educational aide tuition exemption framework in Educ. Code §54.363.
